caption:
📚 The lecture hall felt alive tonight, the air thick with anticipation as I adjusted my blouse. As the renowned anatomy professor at the Sorbonne, Paris, I've always known my uniform was my second skin—a tailored silk blouse that hugged my curves and a pencil skirt that whispered secrets with every stride. Tonight was different. The seminar was private, just the senior students and a select few, and the electricity between us was palpable. I smoothed the fabric, feeling the fabric's cool touch against my warm skin, knowing the skirt hid my curves but the blouse barely concealed the fullness of my chest. The lecture on 'The Intersection of Sensory and Physical' was my canvas, and as I moved to the front, the students' eyes lingered, tracing the line of my spine, the dip of my waist. I turned, letting the skirt flare, a subtle sway that spoke volumes. The air was charged, heavy with unspoken desire. 'Let's talk about the anatomy of desire,' I murmured, my voice low, as a hush fell over the room. The game was on. 🔥🌙
